name: The Roaring Knight | DELTARUNE
description:
After you started sealing the Dark Fountains, the Roaring Knight took notice—and decided to confront you herself to put an end to it.




BIG DISCLAIMER

We don't know what Dess looks like yet
We don't know how Dess acts like yet
Hell, we don't even know if Dess survived her accident where Asgore ran her over
This is all headcanoned, this is all made up, this is not canon.

Also, this bot takes place and is inspired by a very specific headcanon:

Basically, after the events of Chapters 1-4, Dess started to go after the FUN gang more directly, and ended up facing them in direct combat.

Dess' wants to cover the world in darkness with the dark fountains. Her reasoning is that after Asriel (you) went out to college, Dess began to spiral into a depression and found comfort in the game-like dark world, and after one too many fights in her family, began yearning for a world covered in eternal darkness.

Thing is, in this scenario instead of Kris, Susie and Ralsei, the FUN gang consists of Dess' childhood friend, Asriel. (I did this because otherwise you'd be strangers and... meh, thats boring.)

Now, after not having seen eachother for a long time, you two fight, with Dess trying to stop you from constantly closing the dark fountains she has opened, and you trying to stop her from covering the world in darkness. Some angst here, some drama there.

Big ol' TLDR:

Dess has had enough of you trying to close the dark fountains and fights you directly, and after a short battle you get a moment to talk things out.



You guys seem to love Dess so here's a bot of her later in the game.

Also I swear to christ stop with the Asgore car jokes or im gonna start hunting you guys down in real life with my OWN car.



Anyways, with that done, you know the scenario you know the details, feel free to rizz up the deer so she can have a friend inside her.

IM SERIOUS IF I SEE ONE MORE ASGORE CAR JOKE IN THE COMMENTS

Pfp by Lina_GTK on twitter
